name: Lace Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar together until creamy.
2. Blend in flour, salt, milk, and vanilla.
3. Stir in oats.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 8 minutes.
6. Cool for 2 to 3 minutes, then carefully remove cookies from the cookie sheets with a wide spatula. (Cookies will be very thin and lacy.)
